analysis: The project currently has multiple versions of the website (test-website, github-page, docs) with incomplete implementations. The theme is not aligned with the 'blackholes' topic and lacks animated object slides, animated pages, and bulk animated objects. The existing CSS files need to be updated to reflect a cosmic, dark theme with black hole animations and interactive elements.

improvements.description: Update the CSS file to include a dark, cosmic theme with black hole animations, swirling effects, and glowing elements. Ensure the CSS file includes all necessary styles for the black hole theme, animations, and interactive elements.

Complete the HTML content to ensure all sections are properly included, such as the main content area with interactive planets, animated slides, and other sections related to black holes. Add a mobile-friendly navigation menu with a hamburger icon for better usability on mobile devices.

Fix the syntax errors in the showSlide function and complete the JavaScript content to ensure all functions are properly implemented. Add event listeners and functionality for the new buttons added in test-website/index.html.
